query: SELECT c.nome as categoria, COUNT(s.id) as subcategorias FROM orcamento_categorias c LEFT JOIN orcamento_subcategorias s ON s.categoriaId = c.id WHERE c.id >= 30001 GROUP BY c.id, c.nome ORDER BY c.nome;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 4X2C2Km2DVLwNTk.c1886cf7bd86 --database GdPAuRogRcNPzV7ENB2n8s --execute SELECT c.nome as categoria, COUNT(s.id) as subcategorias FROM orcamento_categorias c LEFT JOIN orcamento_subcategorias s ON s.categoriaId = c.id WHERE c.id >= 30001 GROUP BY c.id, c.nome ORDER BY c.nome;
